description: CampaignPlanner executed campaign generation twice due to missing idempotency keys; orchestrator retried after timeout, causing duplicate work.
root_cause: No duplicate work detection and missing idempotency keys in A23 handoff to A15.
resolution: Manually deduped outputs; added temporary guard in CampaignPlanner to check recent job IDs.

description: SEOWriter entered a retry loop after tool response parsing error, inflating token usage (≈180k tokens).
root_cause: Parser bug + missing circuit breaker; poor visibility for per-task cost on A9.
resolution: Parser hotfix; added temporary token cap at campaign level.

description: PromotionEngine accessed production pricing API with elevated scope, applying draft promo rules to live sandbox pricing.
root_cause: Permission drift; monthly audit did not catch interim role change.
resolution: Revoked role; added manual approval for policy changes; rollback of affected promo rules.

description: SupportResponder hit upstream API quota; tasks queued; 320 tasks failed after retries.
root_cause: Quota not enforced at agent level; no graceful degradation path.
resolution: Raised quota with vendor; applied temporary rate limits in A3.

description: RAGSearch returned hallucinated answers due to stale index; customers escalated before QA sampling caught it.
root_cause: Index refresh job delayed; validator only runs on subset of queries.
resolution: Forced reindex; increased validator coverage for A12 temporarily to 20%.

description: Handoff from InventoryForecaster to OrderRouter timed out; retries duplicated partial state.
root_cause: No end-to-end trace IDs; orchestrator retry policy conflicts with downstream idempotency.
resolution: Reduced orchestrator retry attempts for this path; added temporary trace logging.

description: ReturnsAssistant stuck on external API; retries exhausted; no human escalation due to alert misrouting.
root_cause: Alert fatigue and misconfigured routing in Slack; lack of circuit breaker.
resolution: Manually drained queue; corrected Slack webhook; added rate limiting.

description: Monthly close found 9 agents without per-task cost metrics; ~21% of spend cannot be tied to unit economics.
root_cause: Agent-level aggregation only; tool invocation costs not attributed.
resolution: Opened engineering ticket to tag tasks with cost context; pending implementation.

description: SLAWatcher did not page on downstream failures due to threshold misconfiguration.
root_cause: Alert rules too broad; noise suppression suppressed valid alerts.
resolution: Refined alert thresholds; added canary alert test suite.
